diet.title: Muscle Gain Diet 🍗
diet.description: Focus on calorie surplus and high protein intake

tips.text: Increase daily calorie intake with healthy foods
Eat protein-rich foods like eggs, chicken, paneer, and lentils
Include healthy fats like nuts, peanut butter, and ghee
Eat 5–6 small meals instead of 2–3 large meals
Drink milk, smoothies, or banana shakes daily
Add complex carbs like rice, oats, and whole wheat
Focus on strength training (dumbbells, push-ups, squats)
Train 4–5 times per week with progressive overload
Avoid excessive cardio to prevent calorie loss
Increase weights gradually every week
Target major muscle groups (chest, legs, back)
Sleep at least 7–8 hours daily for muscle recovery
Stay consistent with meals and workouts
Avoid stress and maintain a positive mindset
Track your weight weekly
Drink enough water (2–3 liters daily)
Reduce sugar and processed food intake
Eat more vegetables, fruits, and fiber-rich foods
Increase protein intake to stay full longer
Avoid late-night eating
Drink green tea or lemon water
Control portion sizes and avoid overeating
Do cardio exercises (walking, running, cycling)
Add HIIT workouts for faster fat burning
Train at least 4–5 days per week
Combine strength training with cardio
Stay active throughout the day
Drink 2–3 liters of water daily
Sleep 7–8 hours to regulate metabolism
Avoid stress eating and emotional eating
Maintain a consistent daily routine
Track your calories and progress
